title: EntityMetric
description: A transparent, machine-readable METRICS record for a single entity (gene, variant, or pathway) in the translational-evidence track. Metrics are numeric/boolean/null signals under dotted <group>.<name> keys, each carrying a short 'source' provenance note. No opinionated verdicts are baked in; downstream agents compose those from these metrics and may add their own metric keys (additionalProperties is allowed).

entity_id.description: Stable id: gene_id for genes, 'variant:'+rsid for variants, pathway_id for pathways.

label.description: Human-readable label: gene symbol, rsid, or pathway label.

pathway_group.description: Mechanism/pathway group this entity belongs to, or null.

disease_groups.description: Controlled disease dimensions this entity spans.

metrics.description: Dotted metric keys ('<group>.<name>') mapping to {value, source}. additionalProperties allowed so agents can attach their own metric keys.
